description: Grafana panel embed URL patterns and configuration for ToolJet integration with Amazon Managed Grafana

connection.description: AMG panels are embedded via iframe. Authentication uses the shared ALB Cognito session cookie (same domain for /app and /grafana paths).

embedUrlPattern.description: Standard Grafana solo panel embed URL pattern. Variables are substituted at render time.

parameters.dashboardUid: Unique dashboard identifier assigned by Grafana on import
parameters.panelId: Numeric panel ID within the dashboard
parameters.variableName: Dashboard variable name for filtering (e.g., volume, svm)
parameters.variableValue: Value to filter by (e.g., vol_data_01, svm-prod-01)
parameters.from: Start time (relative: now-1h, or absolute epoch ms)
parameters.to: End time (relative: now, or absolute epoch ms)

autoRefresh.description: Panels auto-refresh every 60 seconds. The Grafana refresh parameter is set to 1m to match.

volumeMetrics.description: Panel embed patterns for volume-level performance metrics from Harvest dashboards

variable.name: volume
variable.description: ONTAP volume name to filter metrics

iops.title: Volume IOPS
iops.description: Read/Write/Other IOPS for a specific volume

throughput.title: Volume Throughput
throughput.description: Read/Write throughput in bytes/sec for a specific volume

latency.title: Volume Latency
latency.description: Average read/write latency in microseconds for a specific volume

iopsOverview.title: All Volumes IOPS Overview
iopsOverview.description: Aggregated IOPS across all volumes (no volume filter)

throughputOverview.title: All Volumes Throughput Overview
throughputOverview.description: Aggregated throughput across all volumes (no volume filter)

svmMetrics.description: Panel embed patterns for SVM-level metrics from Harvest dashboards

variable.name: svm
variable.description: ONTAP SVM name to filter metrics

iops.title: SVM IOPS
iops.description: Aggregated IOPS across all volumes within the SVM

throughput.title: SVM Throughput
throughput.description: Aggregated read/write throughput within the SVM

latency.title: SVM Latency
latency.description: Average latency for operations within the SVM

capacity.title: SVM Capacity Utilization
capacity.description: Used vs available capacity across all volumes in the SVM

clusterMetrics.description: Panel embed patterns for cluster-level overview metrics

overview.title: Cluster Overview
overview.description: High-level cluster health and performance summary

aggregateMetrics.description: Panel embed patterns for aggregate utilization metrics

capacity.title: Aggregate Capacity
capacity.description: Used, available, and total capacity per aggregate

variableSubstitution.description: Variable substitution patterns used in embed URLs

{{volumeName}}.description: Selected volume name from the volume selector component

{{svmName}}.description: Selected SVM name from the SVM selector component

{{from}}.format: Grafana relative time (now-Xh/m/d) or epoch milliseconds

{{to}}.format: Grafana relative time (now) or epoch milliseconds
